title: EQUITY CORPS OF OREGON - 211info
text: OREGON WORKER RELIEF EQUITY CORPS OF OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides immigration legal services including access to lawyers, legal clinics, financial assistance with filing fees, and general information and instruction about immigration law and immigrant rights. Eligibility: Household must be below 200% of the federal poverty level and at risk of deportation or need help with an immigration legal matter Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (888) 274-7292 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 274-7292 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website to apply FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Citizenship Expense Assistance Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Immigration Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
